---
title: My gallery
description: Photos and more photos ...
date: last-modified
date-format: short
listing:
    id: id_gallery
    contents: "Gallery/g*/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date"
    max-items: 15
    image-align: left
    image-placeholder: "Figures/noFigureMessage.jpg"
    date-format: long
    categories: true
    sort-ui: [title, date]
---

Still working ...

::: {#id_gallery}
:::
